pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh explicitly specify this path.
Task description explicitly asks for two concentric arcs (inner and outer).
Task description explicitly asks for 8 straight flange segments (4 on each side).
Task description explicitly asks to extrude the profile by 30 mm.
Task description specifies dimensions 20mm (inner arc radius, flange edges), 25mm (outer arc radius), 5mm (flange outer edge), and 30mm (extrusion depth).

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to synthetically create a 3D model of an omega pipe strap from scratch based on text instructions. It has been verified that the expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/pipe_strap.slvs. The model requires exactly 2 arcs and 8 lines, an extrusion depth of 30.0 mm, and incorporates specific constraints corresponding to the dimensions 20.0, 25.0, 5.0, and 30.0 mm.
